sentence: To know sorrow is not terrifying. What is terrifying is to know you cannot go back to the happiness you could have.

sentence: Knowing what it feels to be in pain is exactly why we try to be kind to others.

sentence: Hurt me with the truth. But never comfort me with a lie.

sentence: Spring will be here soon. Spring, the season I met you, is coming. A spring without you... is coming.

sentence: I want to know what I love you means.
